name: com.virtualroom.audience
description: A simulated live audience for public-speaking apps. Fills a room with reactive people who clap, cheer, laugh, nod — or yawn and check out if you lose them. Pick a venue (theatre, classroom, conference hall, comedy club) and drive reactions from your own code. Works in VR, on desktop, and in WebGL builds. Drop in one component and go.

samples.description: A room, an audience, and keyboard keys to react to. Start here.
